name: Oat Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the oat bran cereal, brown sugar, honey, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and raisins.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the skim milk, orange juice, egg whites, eggs, safflower oil, and vanilla until well mixed.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, ensuring no streaks of flour remain.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 12 greased (or non-stick coated) muffin cups.
5. Bake at 425°F for 17 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them to a wire rack to cool completely.
